summary: Tested Valeteck MVP end-to-end. Backend: 17/17 pytest cases PASS (auth, /me, reference lists, checklist CRUD, plate validation, antifraude duplicidade <24h, garantia <30d). Frontend (mobile viewport 390x844): splash→login redirect works, login with tecnico@valeteck.com/tecnico123 succeeds, token persisted in localStorage (web AsyncStorage shim), home renders checklists with alerts banners, search-input + new-checklist-fab present, detail screen shows all sections (cliente, instalação, localização, fotos, assinatura, alertas), profile screen shows user info with logout-btn. Antifraude alerts visible end-to-end (duplicidade and garantia banners on detail screen).

integration_issues.issue: After clicking logout-btn on /profile, URL stayed on /profile and JWT token still present in localStorage immediately after click. Could be timing/animation lag (not retested with longer wait) — recommend confirming clearToken+router.replace('/login') runs synchronously.

action_items: Verify logout flow clears token and navigates to /login (may just be timing; quick self-check via UI is enough).
Optional: address Expo SDK package version mismatch warnings (async-storage 3.0.2 vs expected 2.2.0, expo-camera 55 vs 17, etc.) — not blocking but flagged in expo logs.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is single-file ~500 lines — acceptable for MVP but consider splitting models/routes/seed for maintainability.
CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True — works for Bearer header but is invalid combo if cookies were ever used; for JWT-in-header it is fine.
Photos stored as base64 in MongoDB — fine for MVP but will hit 16MB doc limit with many photos; consider GridFS/S3 later.

5-step new-checklist UI flow was not exercised end-to-end via Playwright (only entry FAB confirmed). Backend validation and Detail rendering of full checklists confirmed working via API + DB-seeded list.

success_rate.frontend: ~85% (login/home/detail/profile flows verified; full 5-step creation UI not exercised)

seed_data_creation: Test created several checklists via API with TEST_ prefix and plates ABC1D23, XYZ1234, QWE2A34, DRA1F23, DUP1A23, GAR2B34. teardown_module attempts to delete rascunhos; enviado checklists remain in DB (cannot delete by design). Visible on home of tecnico@valeteck.com.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend testIDs: login-email, login-password, login-submit, profile-button, search-input, new-checklist-fab, checklist-card-{id}, status-{id}, profile-back, logout-btn, detail-back, alerts. Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env (note: not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). For full new-checklist flow verification, click [data-testid=new-checklist-fab], fill cliente fields, navigate Próximo through instalacao→evidencias→assinatura→revisao.
rca_of_issue: No critical RCA needed. Backend antifraude logic correctly detects: (a) any prior enviado checklist for same normalized plate within 24h → 'duplicidade' alert; (b) prior Instalação enviada within 30d + new Manutenção/Garantia/Retirada → 'garantia' alert. Plate normalization strips dashes and uppercases, supporting both ABC1D23 (Mercosul) and ABC1234 formats.
